name: BitLaunch
description: Cloud VPS reseller for DigitalOcean, Vultr, and Linode across 27 datacenters. Hourly billing, no KYC, native BLPay processor with Lightning.

agent_endpoints.auth_note: API token from account settings; passed as Authorization header. Go, Python, and PHP SDKs plus blcli CLI. llms.txt published.
